qa_pairs.question: What battles took place exactly on 14 April 1205?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT battle.id FROM battle
WHERE battle.date = '14 April 1205'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which battle entities with date equal to '14 April 1205'?

qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which battle entities with result equal to 'Bulgarian victory' and date equal to '4 September 1207' and bulgarian commander equal to 'Unknown', having at least one related ship record (linked on battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle) with location equal to 'English Channel' and name equal to 'HMS Avon'?

qa_pairs.question: Which battles in June 1205 had Boril as the Bulgarian commander and Henry I as the Latin commander, where the ship Mary was captured?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT battle.id FROM battle
JOIN ship ON battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle
WHERE ship.disposition_of_ship = 'Captured' AND battle.bulgarian_commander = 'Boril' AND ship.name = 'Mary' AND battle.date = 'June 1205' AND battle.latin_commander = 'Henry I'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which battle entities with bulgarian commander equal to 'Boril' and date equal to 'June 1205' and latin commander equal to 'Henry I', having at least one related ship record (linked on battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle) with disposition of ship equal to 'Captured' and name equal to 'Mary'?

qa_pairs.question: Which battles named Battle of Rodosto ended in a Bulgarian victory where the ship Bacchus, a Brig with tonnage t, was lost?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT battle.id FROM battle
JOIN ship ON battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle
WHERE ship.ship_type = 'Brig' AND ship.name = 'Bacchus' AND battle.result = 'Bulgarian victory' AND ship.tonnage = 't' AND battle.name = 'Battle of Rodosto'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which battle entities with result equal to 'Bulgarian victory' and name equal to 'Battle of Rodosto', having at least one related ship record (linked on battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle) with ship type equal to 'Brig' and name equal to 'Bacchus' and tonnage equal to 't'?

qa_pairs.question: Which battles resulted in a Bulgarian victory where the Three Brothers ship was lost and the battle name is Battle of Messinopolis?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT battle.id FROM battle
JOIN ship ON battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle
WHERE ship.name = 'Three Brothers' AND battle.name = 'Battle of Messinopolis' AND battle.result = 'Bulgarian victory'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which battle entities with name equal to 'Battle of Messinopolis' and result equal to 'Bulgarian victory', having at least one related ship record (linked on battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle) with name equal to 'Three Brothers'?

qa_pairs.question: Which battles named Siege of Constantinople led by John of Brienne involved ships with a tonnage exactly equal to t?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT battle.id FROM battle
JOIN ship ON battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle
WHERE battle.latin_commander = 'John of Brienne' AND battle.name = 'Siege of Constantinople' AND ship.tonnage = 't'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which battle entities with latin commander equal to 'John of Brienne' and name equal to 'Siege of Constantinople', having at least one related ship record (linked on battle.id = ship.lost_in_battle) with tonnage equal to 't'?
